text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and expectation. The space is bright and modern, with glass walls that reveal another room marked by vibrant design and intimate displays about research and development. I am drawn to ponder the intersection of creativity and technology showcased before me—how we as humans strive to innovate, connect, and make sense of our rapidly changing world. There is a quiet energy, a sense that ideas are being incubated nearby.
